name: @inversealtruism/cairnx-core
description: CairnX — tokens, atomic DvP trades and leased .csd names on Compute Substrate, as a pure deterministic convention library (Ordinals/Runes class). Ships the normative CONVENTION.md and the conformance vectors.

scripts.test: tsx test/vectors.test.ts && tsx test/name-decoy.test.ts && tsx test/client-helpers.test.ts && tsx test/paidto.test.ts && tsx test/preflight.test.ts && tsx test/primary.test.ts && tsx test/fclaim.test.ts && tsx test/fclaim-v28.test.ts && tsx test/verifyfill.test.ts && tsx test/wa-parity.test.ts
